description_long: This object is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet constructed from vertically aligned wooden planks, giving it a rustic and utilitarian appearance. The wood is weathered, with visible grain and a mottled brown coloration, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements or heavy use. The cabinet lacks any visible handles, drawers, or label holders, presenting a seamless, plank-sided exterior on all visible faces. The top surface is flat and composed of the same wooden planks, making it suitable for placing items. There are no visible hinges, locks, or other hardware, indicating a minimalist or possibly decorative design. Its robust build and simple form make it suitable for use in garages, warehouses, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A tall, rectangular wooden filing cabinet with vertically aligned, weathered planks and no visible handles or hardware. Its rustic, seamless design suggests durability and utility.
description_view_0: The front view shows a flat surface of vertical wooden planks with no visible handles, drawers, or hardware.
description_view_1: This side view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the same vertical plank pattern and lack of features.
description_view_2: Another side view, again showing the uniform vertical planks and absence of interactive elements.
description_view_3: The final view mirrors the previous ones, with a continuous wooden plank surface and no distinguishing features.
